goal: Build the Hive Brain — implement the intelligent layer for cross-colony wisdom: abstraction layer that generalizes instincts before promotion, domain-scoped retrieval so hive wisdom filters by repo domain tags, multi-repo validation that boosts confidence when patterns appear across multiple colonies, the ~/.aether/hive/ directory structure (wisdom.json, signals.json, chronicle.json), and the promotion flow from per-repo instincts through abstraction to hive-level wisdom.

phases.name: Hive Directory and Schema Foundation
phases.description: Create ~/.aether/hive/ directory, wisdom.json schema, and hive-init/hive-store/hive-read subcommands

tasks.description: Add hive-store subcommand (write entries with full schema, dedup, 200 cap)
Add hive-read subcommand (domain filtering, access_count tracking)
Write tests for all three hive subcommands

phases.name: Abstraction Layer
phases.description: Build the transformation logic that strips repo-specific details before hive promotion

tasks.description: Add hive-abstract subcommand (generates abstraction prompt for Queen)
Write tests for abstraction and promotion

phases.name: Domain-Scoped Retrieval in Colony-Prime
phases.description: Replace unfiltered eternal injection with domain-scoped hive wisdom retrieval

tasks.description: Modify colony-prime to use hive-read with domain tags from registry
Update hive-intelligence tests for domain-scoped retrieval

phases.name: Seal Promotion Hook
phases.description: Wire hive promotion into the seal ceremony — Queen extracts and promotes instincts to hive

tasks.description: Add Step 3.7 Hive Promotion to seal.md
Add hive subcommands to help output
Mirror seal changes to OpenCode seal.md

success_criteria: Seal promotes high-confidence instincts to hive

phases.name: Multi-Repo Validation and Confidence Boosting
phases.description: Boost confidence when same wisdom pattern appears from multiple repos

tasks.description: Add confidence boosting to hive-store duplicate path (0.7 at 2 repos, 0.85 at 3, 0.95 at 4+)
Write tests for multi-repo confidence boosting

phases.name: Documentation and Validation
phases.description: Update CLAUDE.md and run full test suite

tasks.description: Add Hive Brain section to CLAUDE.md
Run full test suite to verify no regressions

learnings.claim: Hub-level shared files need hub-level locks — per-repo LOCK_DIR cannot protect cross-repo resources
learnings.evidence: Chaos Ant found cross-repo lock isolation bug, fixed by overriding LOCK_DIR to HOME/.aether/hive/

learnings.claim: Content sanitization pattern from pheromone-write (XML rejection, angle bracket escaping, shell injection, prompt injection) is reusable for any user-supplied text input
learnings.evidence: hive-store reused the pattern successfully, 14 integration tests pass including injection tests

learnings.claim: Orchestrator commands should delegate to sibling subcommands via bash "$0" rather than duplicating logic
learnings.evidence: hive-promote orchestrates hive-abstract + hive-store without code duplication, 14 tests pass

learnings.claim: Text transformation placeholders should avoid angle brackets to prevent double-escaping by downstream sanitization
learnings.evidence: Chaos and Auditor both identified placeholder corruption when <source-file> passes through hive-store sanitization

instincts.trigger: when writing subcommands that operate on hub-level shared files
instincts.action: override LOCK_DIR to the target file directory before acquire_lock, restore after release_lock
evidence: Cross-repo lock isolation bug fixed by using hub-level LOCK_DIR

instincts.trigger: when accepting user-supplied text in new subcommands
instincts.action: reuse the pheromone-write sanitization pattern: XML tag rejection, angle bracket escaping, shell injection check, prompt injection check, 500-char cap
evidence: hive-store successfully reused the pattern, all injection tests pass

instincts.trigger: when building orchestrator commands that compose multiple subcommands
instincts.action: use bash $0 subcommand-name to delegate, never duplicate sibling logic
evidence: hive-promote successfully delegates to hive-abstract + hive-store

instincts.action: Use explicit jq if/elif chains instead of the // operator when checking fields that can legitimately be false
